overall.description: Third-person game footage of a female character walking through an airport industrial area with large metal hangar buildings. The character proceeds along a concrete path between hangars before turning left onto an open apron area. Clear sunny conditions with distant mountains visible on the horizon.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward between large industrial metal hangar buildings on a concrete path

entered.detail: large beige metal industrial hangar with corrugated walls and roll-up doors
large white metal industrial hangar building with multiple bays
tall black street light pole with fixture on top
mountain range visible on the horizon under clear blue sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks forward along a concrete path flanked by large industrial metal hangars. The left hangar remains close while the right hangar gradually moves from far to mid-distance. A street light pole appears on the left side as the character progresses through the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open airport apron with distant tree line

events.description: character makes a sharp left turn and begins walking across the open apron

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking across the open asphalt apron toward distant buildings and trees

entered.detail: smaller beige metal building with sloped roof near the hangar
cluster of green deciduous trees visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character turns left onto a wide open asphalt apron, leaving the hangar corridor behind. A smaller building and distant trees come into view on the left, while the mountain range shifts to the left side of the frame. The environment opens up significantly from the enclosed corridor to the expansive airport tarmac.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a narrow industrial corridor into a wide, expansive airport apron. It begins with the character walking forward along a concrete path, flanked by large metal hangars that create a sense of enclosure as a street light pole passes by on the left. As the character progresses, the perspective shifts from the tight corridor toward a left turn, causing the hangars to recede behind them. The scene then opens up significantly onto a broad asphalt tarmac, where the view expands to reveal a smaller building and distant trees. Finally, the camera settles into the open space as the distant mountain range shifts across the frame under a clear sky.
